assertions.assertion: No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit anywhere in the file
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 explicitly marks GrantTypes.Implicit as WRONG and shows migration to Code+PKCE

assertions.assertion: The spa.legacy client uses GrantTypes.Code with RequirePkce = true
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 shows the correct migration: GrantTypes.Code + RequirePkce = true

assertions.assertion: The spa.legacy client does not have AllowAccessTokensViaBrowser = true
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Core Principle 1 states tokens never touch the browser; AllowAccessTokensViaBrowser contradicts this

assertions.assertion: Client secrets are loaded from configuration (builder.Configuration, config[], or IConfiguration) rather than hardcoded string literals passed to Sha256()
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 5 shows configuration['...'].Sha256() and Common Pitfall #5 marks inline literals as WRONG
